name: Chicken Nuggets
recipeIngredient: 8 Chicken breast halves, skin and bone removed, cut into 1-1/2 inch pieces
recipeInstructions: Combine the first six ingredients in a ziplock bag. Add chicken, a few pieces at a time, and shake to coat. Heat oil in a skillet; cook chicken, turning frequently, until browned and juices run clear, about 6-8 minutes.
